description: ASKING FOR MONEY FOR MY NUDES
been extorted because somebody has my nudes

assessmentResult.summary: Your responses indicate some negative impact from online experiences. While you have some coping strategies, additional support could help strengthen your resilience.
assessmentResult.summarySw: Majibu yako yanashiria madhara fulani kutokana na uzoefu wa mtandaoni. Ingawa una mikakati fulani ya kukabiliana, usaidizi zaidi ungewezesha kuimarisha uvumilivu wako.
assessmentResult.summaryKal: Responseetab bo ak itab tishetab cheiso ak online. Ketab kabuutin cheibo, ketusie kogoren koimut resilience
recommendations: Consider speaking with a counselor or therapist
Review and strengthen your privacy settings on all platforms
Document any ongoing harassment for future reporting
Connect with support groups for survivors of online harassment
recommendationsSw: Fikiria kuzungumza na mshauri au mtaalamu
Kagua na kuimarisha mipangilio yako ya faragha kwenye majukwaa yote
Hifadhi uharifu unaendelea kwa ajili ya kuripoti baadaye
Unganishwa na vikundi vya usaidizi wa wanaopona wa uharifu mtandaoni
recommendationsKal: Review ak imut privacy settings platforms tugul
Connect ak piik che uharifu online

assessmentResult.summary: Your responses suggest significant negative impact from online harassment. You are experiencing notable emotional distress and may benefit from immediate support and intervention.
assessmentResult.summarySw: Majibu yako yanapendekeza athari kubwa za kihasibu kutokana na uharifu mtandaoni. Unakumbwa msongo mkubwa wa kihisia na unaweza kufaiki na usaidizi wa haraka na uingiliaji kati.
assessmentResult.summaryKal: Responseetab bo ak itab tishetab cheptisiet nebo uharifu online. Nandoa kiyabet ak kainet ketusie kibagenge
recommendations: Seek immediate support from a mental health professional
Report the harassment to law enforcement
Consider temporarily deactivating affected social media accounts
Create a safety plan with a trusted person
Document all evidence (screenshots, messages, dates)
recommendationsSw: Tafuta usaidizi wa haraka kutoka kwa mtaalamu wa afya ya akili
Ripoti uharifu kwa maafisa wa usalama
Fikiria kuzima kwa muda akaunti za mitandao ya kijamii zilizoathirika
Tenga mpango wa usalama na mtu wa kuaminiwa
Hifadhi ushahidi wote (screenshots, ujumbe, tarehe)
recommendationsKal: Plan usalama ak piik nebo aanai

description: i feel stalked by other people online

assessmentResult.summary: Your responses indicate severe and ongoing harm from online experiences. Immediate professional support is strongly recommended. You do not have to face this alone.
assessmentResult.summarySw: Majibu yako yanashiria madhara makubwa na yanayoendelea kutokana na uzoefu wa mtandaoni. Usaidizi wa kitaaluma wa haraka unaopendekeza sana. Hujalazimika kukabiliana na hii peke yako.
assessmentResult.summaryKal: Responseetab bo ak itab tishetab cheiso miising ak online. Ketusietab professional kibagenge. Maam cheiswei
recommendations: Contact emergency services or a crisis helpline immediately
Reach out to a trusted family member or friend right now
Do not delete any evidence - preserve everything
Consider staying with someone you trust temporarily
Report to police and seek a protection order if needed
Contact a lawyer who specializes in cybercrime or GBV
recommendationsSw: Wasiliana na huduma za dharura au line ya msaada wa dharura mara moja
Wasiliana na mwanafamilia au rafiki wa kuaminiwa sasa hivi
Usifute ushahidi wowote - hifadhi kila kitu
Fikiria kubaki na mtu unayemuamini kwa muda
Ripoti kwa polisi na tafuta amri ya ulinzi ikiwa inahitajika
Wasiliana na mwanasheria mtaalamu wa uhalifu wa mtandao au GBV
recommendationsKal: Contact emergency services ak crisis helpline kibagenge
Contact family member ak friend nebo aanai kibagenge
Stay ak piik nebo aanai kogoren
Report police ak seek protection order ngun cheibo
Contact lawyer nebo cybercrime ak GBV
